context: Source: Video 3: Create an Asset Library with Megascans (11:10). Evolution: charmeleon. MCP tool: synapse_solaris_import_megascans. Live validated: T6 PASS (H21.0.631). Constraints: Megascans .usdc files contain BOTH geometry and materials in layers — they must be imported separately.; Geometry: USD Import inside Component Geometry SOPs with unpack to polygons ON.; Materials: Use a Reference LOP pointing to the SAME .usdc file with /materials/* wildcard.
